heading: Strategic plan
label: 6433a Strategic plan

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom Reauthorization Act of 2015, and not as part of the International Religious Freedom Act of 1998 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives;

children.text: the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 2 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the United States Commission on International Religious Freedom established under .section 6431 of this title

children.heading: Commissioner
children.label: 3 Commissioner
children.text: The term “Commissioner” means a member of the Commission.

children.heading: Vice Chair
children.label: 4 Vice Chair
children.text: The term “Vice Chair” means the Vice Chair of the Commission who was appointed to such position by an elected official from the political party that is different from the political party of the elected official who appointed the Chair of the Commission.

children.heading: Strategic policy and organizational review planning process
children.label: b Strategic policy and organizational review planning process

children.text: a review of the duties set forth in and the powers set forth in ;section 6432 of this titlesection 6432a of this title
the preparation of a written description of prioritized actions that the Commission is required to complete to fulfill the strategic plan required under subsection (d);
a review of the scope, content, and timing of the Commission’s annual report and any required changes; and
a review of the personnel policies set forth in and any required changes to such policies.section 6432b of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the strategic policy and organizational review planning process required under subsection (b); and

children.label: B
children.text: the strategic plan required under subsection (d).

children.label: A
children.text: a majority of Commissioners appointed by an elected official from the political party of the President; and

children.label: B
children.text: a majority of Commissioners appointed by an elected official from the political party that is not the party of the President.
a description of prioritized actions for the Commission for a period of time to be specified by the Commissioners;
a description of any changes the Commission considers necessary with regard to the scope, content, and timing of the Commission’s annual report;
a description of any changes the Commission considers necessary with regard to personnel matters; and
the Commission’s funding requirements for the period covered by the strategic plan.

children.heading: Pending issues
children.label: e Pending issues
children.text: The strategic plan required under subsection (d) may identify any issues or proposals that have not yet been resolved by the Commission.

children.heading: Implementation of personnel provisions and annual report
children.label: f Implementation of personnel provisions and annual report
children.text: Notwithstanding section 6432b(a) and 6533(a) of this title, the Commission is authorized to implement provisions related to personnel and the Commission’s annual report that are included in the strategic plan submitted pursuant to this section.1So in original. Probably should be “sections”.1
make available for inspection any information and documents requested by the appropriate congressional committees; and
respond to any requests to provide testimony before the appropriate congressional committees.
